headline: Constellation Energy Taps NVIDIA AI Factories As Power Market Role Grows
summary: NVIDIA has partnered with Constellation Energy (NasdaqGS:CEG) and several large U.S. utilities to supply power for AI data center "factories". The collaboration focuses on tying flexible, grid aware compute workloads to real time grid conditions. This arrangement connects AI power demand directly with Constellation's generation and grid management capabilities. Constellation Energy, a major U.S. power producer, now sits closer to the core of AI infrastructure planning through its work with...

headline: JPMorgan Lowers its Price Target on Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) to $400 from $410
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the 8 Must-Buy Nuclear Energy Stocks to Invest In.
